metadata.description: Claude Code plugin for auditing Microsoft Copilot Studio bootcamp labs end-to-end via Playwright.

plugins.name: mcs-lab-auditor
plugins.description: Audit AND interactively build Microsoft Copilot Studio labs (any event/workshop) end-to-end via Playwright. Audit mode files fingerprint-deduped findings + fix PRs; build mode authors a new lab step-by-step, gates it through the audit engine, and opens a PR adding it to mcs-labs.
